expected_signals.summary: Character.AI is launching three microdramas and says users over 18 can chat with the characters and roleplay alternate storylines.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: Users older than 18 can chat with these shows' characters

expected_signals.summary: The company says it is starting with a studio-led model and plans to turn the resulting workflow into creator tools for user-made series.
The article explicitly frames these launches as part of Character.AI's shift toward entertainment-focused features.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: shift toward entertainment-focused features last year

expected_signals.summary: The article cites strong engagement, saying users spent more than 950 minutes per month on Character.AI in the first half of 2026.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: spent more than 950 minutes on Character.AI each month

notes: No runnable verifier: this is a static-document extraction task. Observable proof is that each anchor_quote is an exact substring from the provided text. The interactive chat/roleplay capability is explicitly limited to users older than 18.
